TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Taoyuan Nsgan Taoyuan o gaga Nsgan Kaohsiung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 969.43 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 871.9 km², dxgal pmblxan o 86.77 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 4,172, sapah o 1,320, seejiq tnpusu 3,872 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 93% (Bunung, Raarua). Bunung, Raarua ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Taoyuan o niqan 8 alang ni maxal 14. 14 o, Ciusinlun , Husida , Tamahu , Sʉhlʉnganʉ/Sulungan , Rʉhlʉcʉ/Haising , Su'aci , Kalʉvʉnga/Ngani , Tanguhla/Dinkam , Mizuhu , Ua-asik , Lavulan , Dakus , Masuhuaz , Dai-ni . pusupnyahan patas
S.PHON: taojuan nsgan taojuan o gaga nsgan kaoħsiuŋ, kmpɾaan kana dxgal o ***.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o ***.* km*, dxgal pmblxan o **.** km*). kmħbɾagan ħiji o *,***, sapaħ o *,***, səəɟiq tnpusu *,*** ħiji, knħbɾagan ħiji o **% (bunuŋ, ɾaaɾua). bunuŋ, ɾaaɾua ka ħbaɾaw balaj alaŋ ħini. njusan qpaħan nsgan taojuan o niqan * alaŋ ni maxal **. ** o, ʦiusinlun , ħusida , tamaħu , s*ħl*ŋan*/suluŋan , ɾ*ħl*ʦ*/ħaisiŋ , su'aʦi , kal***ŋa/ŋani , taŋuħla/dinkam , mi*uħu , ua-asik , la*ulan , dakus , masuħua* , dai-ni . pusupnjaħan patas
S.FORM: Taoyuan Nsgan Taoyuan o gaga Nsgan Kaohsiung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 969.43 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 871.9 km², dxgal pmblxan o 86.77 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 4,172, sapah o 1,320, seejiq tnpusu 3,872 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 93% (Bunung, Raarua). Bunung, Raarua ka hbaraw balay alang hini. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Taoyuan o niqan 8 alang ni maxal 14. 14 o, Ciusinlun , Husida , Tamahu , Sʉhlʉnganʉ/Sulungan , Rʉhlʉcʉ/Haising , Su'aci , Kalʉvʉnga/Ngani , Tanguhla/Dinkam , Mizuhu , Ua-asik , Lavulan , Dakus , Masuhuaz , Dai-ni . pusupnyahan patas
